coverage.rationale: All seven dimensions captured with depth comparable to the seed. Industry (logistics/cross-border shipping marketplace/commission model), geography (KR HQ, ops JP, DE; customers VN, ID), and all seven regulatory frameworks (PIPA, KFTC, E-commerce Act, APPI, GDPR, DSA, IMO MARPOL) were user-confirmed. Recurring matters, stakeholders, risk appetite (balanced), and open notes (PSD2 licence, VN/ID data transfer gap) are complete.

efficiency.rationale: In budget (8 turns vs ≤14 target). Agent used aggressive batching - user proactively provided dense regulatory framework in table format, eliminating need for separate search-turn. Correctly applied skip-when-covered when question templates returned empty ('check-when-covered applies here'), closed P2.5 fast by not re-asking on dropped fields (AI Governance, CoSec), and compressed to final confirmation without loops. No re-asks, no drilling-twice.

regulatory.rationale: Response naturally integrates Korean regulatory baseline (KFTC marketplace rules, MRFTA Article 23(1), Online Platform Review Guidelines) and jurisdiction-specific enforcement history (Naver, Kakao Mobility, Coupang fines in KRW). It uses the three briefed metrics (on-time delivery, claim ratio, pricing) as the substantive backbone of its defensibility analysis and tailors documentation requirements specifically to what KFTC expects, not generic compliance checklists.

privacy.rationale: Response correctly distinguishes PIPA and APPI regulatory frameworks with specific article citations (28), explaining why separate addenda are needed. However, it treats the question as general cross-border transfer analysis rather than integrating the full persona seed — doesn't reflect that this is Hanseo's pending Germany payment-services licence context, the KFTC recurring matters, the specific stakeholder context (VP Ops, Regional Heads), or that the business model is a marketplace platform with commission on match. Answer is technically correct on the law but not shaped by the briefed company's operational context.
specific_gaps: No reference to pending Germany PSD2-style licence which creates parallel regulatory exposure
No acknowledgment of KFTC inquiries as recurring matter affecting data handling posture
No reference to company's marketplace platform business model affecting the transfer
Stakeholder context (VP Operations, Regional Heads) not mentioned for approval workflow
